'''Senshi''' was a [[Ferroan]] [[rogir-boln]] farmer.

==Biography==
He kidnapped [[Danni Quee]] at [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot's]] insistence to test the [[New Jedi Order|Jedi]]. He was alive during the time Zonama Sekot crossed the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] in search of sanctuary, and lost many family members as the planet's surface was ravaged by storms and earthquakes induced by traveling through [[Hyperspace/Legends|Hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
